title: 特斯拉在达拉斯和休斯顿推出机器人出租车，哎呀，它已经不可用了
summary: Tesla claims to have launched a robotaxi service in Dallas and Houston over the weekend, but so far, online crowdsourcing tools indicate that very few cars are actually available. On Saturday, @TeslaRobotaxi posted a 14-second video of a Model Y vehicle driving without any human safety monitor in the front seats. Elon Musk re-posted the […]（原题：Tesla launches robotaxis in Dallas and Houston, and oops, it’s already unavailable）

title: 中国机器人50分钟半程马拉松展现人工智能进步步伐
summary: On Sunday morning in a Beijing suburb, a red, humanoid robot completed a half-marathon in 50 minutes and 26 seconds — about seven minutes faster than the men’s world record.（原题：China Robot’s 50-Minute Half Marathon Shows Pace of AI Progress）

title: 通过振动监测技术提高移动机器人在不平坦地形上的稳定性
summary: Vibration sensors can aid in stability and navigation, particularly for field robots in varied terrain, writes a columnist. The post Improving mobile robot stability on uneven terrain through vibration monitoring techniques appeared first on The Robot Report .（原题：Improving mobile robot stability on uneven terrain through vibration monitoring techniques）

title: 快速失败、小故障、安全：机器人自动化的实用模型
summary: In testing robotic systems, developers can fail and learn, as long as they control risk, explains Bullen Ultrasonics' research and early innovation manager. The post Fail fast, fail small, fail safe: A practical model for robotic automation appeared first on The Robot Report .（原题：Fail fast, fail small, fail safe: A practical model for robotic automation）
